summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Animal Voice Lab application. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend functionality fully operational including animal selection, vocalization/expression tabs, audio player, AI analysis, and history tracking.
passed_tests: All 7 animals (monkey, dog, cat, horse, lion, parrot, tiger) loaded correctly
GET /api/animals/{id} returns detailed animal data with vocalizations and expressions
POST /api/analyze successfully processes both vocalizations and expressions
Animal selection interface works across all animals
Vocalization tab displays audio player with play/pause/mute controls
Expression tab displays expression cards with selection
AI analysis functionality translates animal communications to human language
Analysis results display with translation, context, and behavioral insights
Analysis history updates after each analysis
Audio player controls (play, pause, mute) function correctly
Vocalization switching updates audio player content
Tab switching between vocalizations and expressions works smoothly
Animal switching updates hero section and content appropriately
